arts.ttl: Walsall’s automatic promotion bid continues to stutter after draw at Newport
arts.sum: The Saddlers are now 12 games without a win.

The early kick off in League Two sees two sides with the worst form in the division. Newport have won just two of their last 13 games and have lost eight games in that time. Walsall who were top of ...

arts.ttl: Preview: Newport County vs. Walsall - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's League Two clash between Newport County and Walsall, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
